zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Townsend於1475年出生在英國諾福爾可吉波利時，她的父親Sir Roger Townshend46歲，母親Eleanor Lunsford30歲。她於1488年9月12日與Sir Thomas Woodhouse在英國諾福爾可吉波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1551年在她的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Townsend于1475年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，她的父亲Sir Roger Townshend46岁，母亲Eleanor Lunsford30岁。她于1488年9月12日与Sir Thomas Woodhouse在英国諾福爾可吉波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1551年在她的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Townsend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived at the extremity of a village, from Middle English toun(es)ende. Compare Town . There may have been some confusion with Townson .

variants.name: Town
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Kent): topographic name from Middle English toun(e), t(h)one, tun(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn), often in the senses ‘primary settlement within an area’, ‘manor, estate’, and ‘hamlet, farm’, for someone who lived in such a place.

variants.name: Townzen
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Townsend  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Townsend was born in 1475, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Roger Townshend, was 46 and her mother, Eleanor Lunsford, was 30. She married Sir Thomas Woodhouse on 12 September 1488, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1551, in her hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Townsend est née en 1475, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Townshend, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Lunsford, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Woodhouse le 12 septembre 1488, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1551, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Townsend 1475 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Townshend 46 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Lunsford 30. Sie hat am 12. September 1488 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England Sir Thomas Woodhouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1551 im Alter von 76 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Townsend è nata il nel 1475 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Townshend, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Lunsford, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Woodhouse il 12 settembre 1488, nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1551, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Townsendが1475年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Townshendは46歳，母Eleanor Lunsfordは30歳であった。1488年9月12日にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーでSir Thomas Woodhouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1551年に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Townsend(이)가 1475년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Townshend(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Lunsford(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1488년 9월 12일 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 Sir Thomas Woodhouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1551년 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Townsend nasceu em 1475, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Townshend, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Lunsford, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Woodhouse em 12 de setembro de 1488, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1551, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Townsend родилась в 1475 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Townshend было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Lunsford, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Woodhouse 12 сентября 1488 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1551 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine Townsend nació en 1475, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Townshend, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Eleanor Lunsford, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Woodhouse el 12 de septiembre de 1488, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1551, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
